name: polymarket-weather-trading-bot
desc: A TypeScript bot that trades Polymarket daily-high temperature markets. It builds a probability distribution of each city's high (Open-Meteo ensemble + NWS), c…
descFull: A TypeScript bot that trades Polymarket daily-high temperature markets. It builds a probability distribution of each city's high (Open-Meteo ensemble + NWS), converts it into per-°C-bucket odds, compares against the live CLOB order book, and places fractional-Kelly–sized bets only where model and market disagree. Paper and live modes, with built-in
